feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ILM Data Retrieval De-Archiving Options in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to clarify the available options in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition regarding the possibility of restoring or de-archiving data managed through Information Lifecycle Management (ILM).

Specifically, we would like to understand whether it is possible to recover archived data back into the active system in exceptional scenarios, such as audit requirements or cases where data has been archived unintentionally.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Refinitiv Feed Update: Modifying exchange rate feeds for GBP/GIP and related currency conversions.
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Regarding exchange rate type 'M': Is it possible to provide a daily Refinitiv feed for GBP to EUR, CHF, and USD, as well as GIP to those same currencies, for the KPMG project?

Impacting Business :- 

The lack of accurate exchange rate feeds is impacting our financial integrity. Specifically, it leads to inaccurate Reporting in local currencies and causes errors during Foreign Currency Valuation (FCV) at month-end. This could result in significant unrealised gains or losses being recorded incorrectly

As this is a daily requirement, we want to move away from manual updates. We would appreciate your guidance on how to adjust the Refinitiv feed or implement an alternative automated method to handle these rates


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set Order price qty tolerance B1/B2 in public cloud or change setting of Message no. M7028?
entry.content:
Hi

I used price units in the purchase order and set unlimited over-delivery,  but when I posted and manually entered the Qty in PO Price Unit, the following error occurred: Shortfall below order price quantity amounting to more than 50.00 %
Message no. M7028

 

 

 

I tried the following methods, but none worked:
1. In the IMG of the public cloud, I could not find the similar configuration as in OP: Materials Management - >Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Goods Receipt - >Set Tolerance Limits, so I could not set the tolerance for B1/B2.
2. In Define Attributes of System Messages, there is no message number M7028, and the public cloud does not allow creating new entries, so I cannot manually add M7028 and set it to W.

How can this issue be resolved in the public cloud?

Kindly advise.

Regards

entry.title: G/L does not exist in company Code during Automatic Payment Run and Bank Reconciliation
entry.content:
We have a problem with the G/L Account masking in the Account Symbol in Make Global Settings in Electronic Bank Statement in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud 2602 Version. When doing payment run and reprocess bank statement items. It does not capture the right G/L set on the Bank Determination and as Bank Subaccount. The current set up of our G/L is 8 characters long and we have this as pattern to our bank G/L

  1. Main Bank Account- 1020++++
  2. Incoming G/L Account-1021++++
  3. Outgoing G/L Account- 1022++++

As part of agreement with the client, we have decided that the last 4 digits is the last four digits of the account number in bank. 


Here are the confiugration made: 

1. Bank Determination- set up the G/L 10220012 as bank subaccount for the house bank

 

2. Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank Statement- Account Symbol masking 1022++++

 

However in the payment run, the G/L captured is entirely different. 

 

 

Can you help us with the right masking and what is the right behavior for this?

entry.title: Custom Validation not working for create incoming invoices App
entry.content:
User needs to display the warning message while posting if the amount entered in Amount is greater than 50,00,000 INR in following applications - create supplier invoice, create supplier invoice – Advanced, create incoming invoices.
Validation is working as expected in the "Create Supplier Invoice" App with "MRM_CHECK_INVOICE_CLOUD" Extension point, we're unable to find the accurate Extension point for "Create Incoming Invoices" & "Create Supplier Invoice - Advance" App.

entry.title: Create supplier invoice app and import supplier invoice app does not flow to DRC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We noticed that when we use "Create Supplier Invoice" app and "Import Supplier Invoice" app to create the Finance invoices, it doesn't flow to SAP DRC.

However, it is working fine if using "Create Incoming Invoices" app. For MM invoices from "Create Supplier Invoice -Advanced" app, there is no issue as well. It is able to flow to SAP DRC.

Anyone has any thoughts?

Thanks!

entry.title: Material Deletion Error
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have a list of materials which is duplicated that we have to remove from the system.

As we understand, we can set the deletion flag for the materials.

Even though we set the deletion flag, we still are able to create sales orders by using those materials.

It only shows the information message, we want it to be shown as error message.

That particular material should not be allowed to use in the sales order at all.

For eg. Material ARF32101985

Please help.

CB User - CB9980000000

entry.title: G/L Accounts Mass Change of Company Code Data not possible
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

In the “Manage G/L Account Master Data” app, in the company code view, I can no longer perform mass changes as usual. Here is an example where I want to change the field status group:

I select G/L accounts and click the “Mass Change” and “Other Attributes” buttons.

 

But my accounts aren't showing up below.

 

In the chart of accounts view and the controlling area view, it works as usual.

Does anyone know what might have happened? In various other systems I have access to (starter, demo, and implementation systems), it also works in the company code view.

Thanks in advance for any tips!

Best regards,

Rado

entry.title: Group revenue GL from SD billing in public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

If it possible to group revenue as one line?

In billing , we have multiple line item but when posting GL, we want only one line (by GL and WBS)

entry.title: Suppress Standard Address in Adobe Invoice Form – S/4HANA PublicCloud
entry.content:
We are working on an invoice output requirement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) where the business needs to display a different company address on the Adobe invoice form based on a specific condition (Profit Center B0011).

To achieve this, we have:

  • Created a custom field at the billing document header level
  • Implemented custom logic (BAdI) to populate the field based on Profit Center
  • Maintained Output Parameter Determination (OPD) to trigger a custom form template
  • Modified the Adobe form to display the required (new) address

With this approach, we are successfully able to populate and display the new address.

Issue:
The standard company code address is still being rendered by the system along with the new address, resulting in an overlap on the invoice output.

We have attempted to control visibility within the Adobe form; however, the standard address block still appears, likely due to standard binding from the data source.

Query:
Is there a recommended approach in S/4HANA Cloud to suppress or override the standard company address in the billing document Adobe form so that only the custom address is displayed?

Any guidance on handling or controlling the standard address node/subform would be helpful.

entry.title: Requirement for Generating Random Serial numbers in Process Order in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We have a client requirement to create random serial numbers within a Process Order ( Range: 300000000 to 399999999 )

But system is generating the number serially whereas we need them to be randomized. Like for 10 Units of FG we require 10 random numbers from Range: 300000000 to 399999999

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Estimated Cost should not be released if BOM is not defined
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

We have a requirement that if a material does not have a BOM in the system, its cost should not be released through the costing run. During the costing run, the system should throw an error for such materials.

Regards,

entry.title: AVC mass upload data into variant tables
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Since the CU60E isn’t available in the public cloud, I’m looking for a way to populate variant tables for variant configuration in bulk or via upload.

As far as i know the only way is manual entry or copying and pasting from Excel.

My client has quite extensive variant tables that he wants to maintain easily and efficiently.

entry.title: Cancel the GRN document post UD Clearance in SAP Public cloud.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

User has performed the GRN and  also cleared the quality posting as well, now the post receiving the material into stock w.r.t Purchase order. they come to know that they have received the wrong product. Kindly suggest how to reverse the GRN Entry and again perform GRN w.r.t same Purchase order. So that the required action could be performed again. 

Below error is coming while performing the Cancellation :

You cannot cancel GR, since inspection lot is already partly posted

Message no. QA046

Diagnosis

You are attempting to reverse a goods receipt although quantity postings have already been made from the inspection lot. This means that stock for the goods receipt has already been transferred and, for this reason, a cancelation of the document is no longer possible.

 

Procedure

Ensure that the postings in QM (within the usage decision transactions) are carried out.

entry.title: Issue in Creating SES with Multiple Subline Items Due to Decimal Quantity Limitation
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are facing an issue while creating the Service Entry Sheet (SES) for a Purchase Order that was migrated from ECC to Grow.The PO contains multiple subline items (approximately 1,000 lines). During SES creation, users are unable to enter the exact service quantities, as the system restricts quantity values to only three decimal places (e.g., 0.123). Due to this SAP system limitation, a shortfall in the total amount is occurring when compared to the PO value at the time of SES posting.Because of this discrepancy, users are unable to complete the SES with the precise quantity and value reflected in the PO.Could you please advise on the recommended approach to proceed with a trial or interim SES entry in such scenarios? Specifically, guidance would be appreciated on:

  • How to handle the quantity rounding differences
  • Whether an adjustment line or alternative process is recommended
  • Any best practices or SAP-supported workaround for SES creation with high-volume subline items

Your support and suggestions on how to proceed in such cases would be greatly appreciated.Thank you for your assistance.

Additionally, could you please confirm whether there is any possibility to import SES service line items via a file (e.g., Excel/upload template or mass upload option) instead of manual entry, especially for POs with a high number of service subline items?

Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Entity Hierarchy Value Help
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to extend a Fiori application by adding a custom field with a hierarchical value help. However, the application is not released for cloud development, which means using CDS-based hierarchy value help is not supported.

As an alternative, we are considering creating the hierarchy value help using a custom entity and exposing it for consumption in the custom field as a code list based on a CDS view.

We are not sure if this approach is feasible in this scenario. Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Partial Payment using JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest API
entry.content:
Hello,

I require assistance with implementing a partial payment using the JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest API.   My attempts consistently result in the error message: "Document or line item does not exist for invoice reference."


Despite following the API documentation I undrestand that I doind correctly.  The documentation states that the InvoiceReferenceDocument field must be structured as follows: Invoice Number + Company Code ID + Fiscal Year.

May someone please review the information provided in the attached document and advise on the necessary corrections?

Best regards,

Marcos Andrade

entry.title: Partial payment using JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest API
entry.content:
Hello,

I require assistance with implementing a partial payment using the JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest API.   My attempts consistently result in the error message: "Document or line item does not exist for invoice reference."


Despite following the API documentation I undrestand that I doind correctly.  The documentation states that the InvoiceReferenceDocument field must be structured as follows: Invoice Number + Company Code ID + Fiscal Year.


May someone please review the information provided in the attached document and advise on the necessary corrections?

Best regards,

Marcos Andrade

entry.title: Unable to locate scope item for a app
entry.content:
We are looking for an app called 'Manage Production Supply Areas' and determined it is part of two business catalogs, SAP_SCM_BC_KNBN_CTRLC_MGMT_MC and SAP_SCM_BC_KNBN_PSA_DSP_PC which do not exist in our instance of S/4. We are trying to figure out what scope item has those catalogs and our research isn't turning up much. We need help finding this, so we can activate those scope items. Any help is appreciated.

Thanks,

Mike

entry.title: The application 'Test your Processes' is not running.
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Public cloud Edition ,When running in the app 'Test your Processes', if you run a test process created in the 'Manage Your Test Processes' app, the percentage number should gradually increase, but it stops at 0%.

How can this be resolved?

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.Create own test processes with the "Manage Your Test Processes" app. This time, I registered the procedures for the J58 scope item myself.

2.Run the created test process in the 'test your processes' app

3.It stays at '0% complete, in process' and doesn't move for a whole day.
